seoTitle: Wilyabrup vs Windabout — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wilyabrup and Windabout. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wilyabrup and Windabout.
heading: Wilyabrup vs Windabout — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wilyabrup, Western Australia and Windabout, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wilyabrup has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Windabout (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wilyabrup or Windabout safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wilyabrup has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Windabout scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wilyabrup scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Windabout scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wilyabrup or Windabout?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wilyabrup has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
